name: SiliconFlow
description: Registers SiliconFlow as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with upstream model discovery.

env.description: Fallback SiliconFlow API key used for discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: SiliconFlow API key
settings.description: SiliconFlow API key used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to SILICONFLOW_API_KEY.

providers.name: SiliconFlow
providers.description: Refreshes SiliconFlow chat models from the upstream catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
